name: O.R.C. Pincher Earwig
description: The O.R.C. Pincher Earwig is the controlled version of this close-range earwig. It keeps the fast strings and heavy claw punish of the base species, but now it converts every opening into harsher pressure.
behavior: It patrols in short loops and constantly tries to keep you in front of its claws. Once it finds an opening, it links its strings with far less downtime than the normal variant.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and forces you to respect straight-on melee much more. Its fast chains turn even a small mistake into several hits in a row.
interactionWithCreatures: In O.R.C. waves it usually takes the front line or the short flank, where its claws force retreats while other units cut off your path.
strategy: Acid remains the cleanest answer. Keep your block timing tight, do not stand in front of it for too long, and punish the short recovery after the heavy claw follow-up.

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo
abilities.description: A three-hit series with very little downtime between swings.

abilities.name: 5-Hit Combo
abilities.description: A long sequence that keeps pressure going unless you break the rhythm.

abilities.name: Charged Pinch
abilities.description: A heavy pinch attack that punishes weak defense.
